scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && cp src/server/index.html dist/server/index.html && cp src/server/kanban.html dist/server/kanban.html && cp src/server/dashboard-ui.css dist/server/dashboard-ui.css && cp src/server/dashboard-ui.js dist/server/dashboard-ui.js && cp src/server/kanban-ui.css dist/server/kanban-ui.css && cp src/server/kanban-ui.js dist/server/kanban-ui.js && cp src/server/favicon-16.png dist/server/favicon-16.png && cp src/server/favicon-32.png dist/server/favicon-32.png && cp src/server/favicon-180.png dist/server/favicon-180.png && cp src/server/brand-logo.png dist/server/brand-logo.png && chmod +x dist/cli/cli.js && chmod +x dist/server/mcp-standalone.js && node scripts/inject-version.js && rm -rf dist/www && cp -r www dist/www
scripts.//: Tests run in two lanes via PRLL: serial lane (concurrency 1, process-spawning/daemon-lifecycle tests) runs first, parallel lane (pure-logic tests, default concurrency) runs after. Both lanes always run regardless of the other's outcome; exit code is 0 only when both pass. Contributors do not need to know about lanes — just run npm test. See scripts/run-all-lanes.sh and tests/serial-files.txt. TAMANDUA_PI_BINARY=/usr/bin/false guarantees no unit test can ever spawn a real model. Tests that need a harness set their own fake TAMANDUA_PI_BINARY (the key passes through cleanChildEnv).
